title: Pollen Metabarcoding Protocol
author: Tomasz Suchan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sp2edqe

steps.title: Vortex the butterfly in 50 μl of water with 0
steps.instruction: Vortex the butterfly in 50 μl of water with 0.1% SDS. Add blank sample at this step (= "isolation blank") http://null

steps.title: Prepare the mix
steps.instruction: Prepare the mix: undetermined, molecular grade water undetermined, Phire Plant Direct PCR mix undetermined, ITS2-S2F primer undetermined, ITS2-4R primer

steps.title: Prepare the mix
steps.instruction: Prepare the mix: undetermined, molecular grade water undetermined, Q5 reaction buffer undetermined, dNTPs (25 mM each) undetermined, Q5 Hot Start polymerase

steps.title: Add 5 μl of the Phire Plant Direct sample buffer
steps.instruction: Add 5 μl of the Phire Plant Direct sample buffer.

steps.title: Perform AMPure purification with ratio 1x
steps.instruction: Perform AMPure purification with ratio 1x. Elute in 10 μl. AMPure purification protocol by Tomasz Suchan

steps.title: Run the PCR program
steps.instruction: Run the PCR program: 30 s denaturation at 98°C; 12 cycles of denaturation at 98 °C for 10 s, combined annealing and extension at 72°C for 30 s (shuttle PCR); the final extension at 72°C for 5 min.

steps.title: Perform AMPure purification with ratio 1x
steps.instruction: Perform AMPure purification with ratio 1x. Elute in 100 μl. AMPure purification protocol by Tomasz Suchan

steps.title: Check the concentration using Qubit and...
steps.instruction: Check the concentration using Qubit and the profile using Tapestation/Fragment Analyzer. Calculate molarity from that and proceed to the sequencing. Add 15% PhiX to the sequencing run.

steps.title: Run the PCR program
steps.instruction: Run the PCR program: initial denaturation at 98°C for 5 min; 20 cycles of denaturation at 98°C for 40 s, annealing at 49°C for 40 s and elongation at 72°C for 40 s; followed by a final extension step at 72°C for 5 min.

steps.title: Add 1 μl of the sample...
steps.instruction: Add 1 μl of the sample to 49 μl of the mix. Use water instead of the sample for the blanks. Add another blank sample at this step (= "PCR blank")

steps.title: Add 1 μl of the template...
steps.instruction: Add 1 μl of the template to 7 μl of the mix.

steps.title: Add 1 μl of each 5...
steps.instruction: Add 1 μl of each 5 uM primer (forward and reverse). Use different pair of indexed primers for each sample.
